comments.author: Usual_Oil1390
comments.body: what is the name of this EA?

replies.author: Usual_Oil1390
replies.body: is this a scalping bot or a swing bot?

replies.author: morriase
replies.body:
Mostly intraday.
Average trade is ~4 hours, but it can hold longer (even days) depending on the setup.

replies.author: Usual_Oil1390
replies.body: is the drawdown really that low?

replies.author: morriase
replies.body:
It’s relatively low, but it varies.
On some pairs, I’ve seen drawdowns reach around ~6% in backtests.

comments.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
comments.body:
Hey there, I also have my own profitable ML-based trading model for BTC (and it also works on Gold). I’ve tested it on about 5 years of data and it averaged roughly around 10% per month with fixed lot. It has a sharpe ratio of >3. I don’t have much capital myself, so I’m looking for genuine people who might be interested to buying it. If anyone’s genuinely interested, feel free to message me.

This is the report of my model - [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive_link)
